title: BasicProofBundle
description: A portable, self-contained Decision Passport proof bundle. Contains all records and the chain manifest. Verifiable offline.

bundle_version.description: Schema version for the basic proof bundle format.

exported_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the bundle was exported.

passport_records.description: Ordered array of PassportRecord objects forming the hash chain.

manifest.description: Chain summary with record count, boundary IDs, and chain_hash.

runtime_claim.description: Optional v0.7.0 runtime claim used by Decision Guard semantics.

outcome_binding.description: Optional compact execution-result binding used by v0.7.0 outcome semantics.
